scripts.env:cleanup: npm run env:teardown && npm run kill:ports && npm run kill:processes && npm run kill:emulators && npm run artifacts:delete
scripts.env:setup: npm run maestro:device:start:android && npm run android:install:wikipedia
scripts.env:teardown: npm run android:uninstall:wikipedia && npm run maestro:device:stop
scripts.env:cleanup:ios: npm run env:teardown:ios && npm run ios:erase:simulator && npm run kill:ports && npm run kill:processes && npm run artifacts:delete
scripts.env:setup:ios: npm run ios:download:wikipedia && npm run maestro:device:start:ios && npm run ios:install:wikipedia
scripts.env:teardown:ios: npm run ios:uninstall:wikipedia && npm run maestro:device:stop:ios
scripts.kill:emulators: adb devices | grep emulator | cut -f1 | while read d; do adb -s "$d" emu kill; done
scripts.ios:uninstall:wikipedia: xcrun simctl uninstall booted org.wikimedia.wikipedia 2>/dev/null || true
scripts.artifacts:delete: npm run recordings:delete && npm run report:delete && rm -rf test-report/*
scripts.send:report:emails: npm run report:archive && npm run report:email
scripts.capture:android:logs: rm -rf android_emulator_logs.txt && adb logcat -c && adb logcat -v time > android_emulator_logs.txt
